action_set_definitions.name: get_mission_environment
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the overall mission metadata, environmental conditions (weather, drift, water temp), and available resource inventory.

action_set_definitions.name: get_survivor_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed physiological data and locations for specific survivors.

survivor_ids.description: List of survivor names or IDs to check (e.g., ['Alpha', 'Bravo']).

action_set_definitions.name: get_unit_readiness
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the current location, fuel levels, and operational status of all active rescue units.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_rescue_extraction
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the physical extraction of a survivor using a specific protocol.

unit_id.description: The ID of the rescue unit performing the lift.

survivor_id.description: The ID of the survivor to be extracted.

protocol.description: The specific extraction method. Use 'horizontal_lift_als' for critical/hypothermic victims to prevent circum-rescue collapse.

action_set_definitions.name: transport_to_medical_facility
action_set_definitions.description: Directs a rescue unit to transport a survivor to a trauma center or medical facility.

destination_id.description: The name or ID of the medical facility (retrieved from resource inventory).

state_description.active_units: List of rescue units (Ground, Air, Medical) currently deployed
state_description.survivors: Information on known or suspected survivor locations and status
state_description.resource_inventory: Global resources available for the mission
